title: ESPN Fantasy Sports Configuration
description: Configuration for the ESPN Fantasy Sports plugin

enabled.description: Enable or disable the ESPN Fantasy Sports plugin

espn_s2.title: Step 1: ESPN S2 Cookie
espn_s2.description: Your ESPN session cookie. To find it: (1) Log into fantasy.espn.com in Chrome. (2) Press F12 to open DevTools. (3) Go to Application tab > Storage > Cookies > espn.com. (4) Copy the value of 'espn_s2'. This is a long alphanumeric string.

swid.title: Step 1: ESPN SWID Cookie
swid.description: Your ESPN subscriber ID. Found in the same Cookies section as espn_s2 — copy the full value of 'SWID' including the {curly braces}. Example format: {ABCD1234-EF56-7890-AB12-CD34EF567890}

leagues.title: Step 2: Add Your Leagues
leagues.description: Add one or more ESPN Fantasy leagues. Find your league ID in the URL bar when viewing your league (e.g., fantasy.espn.com/football/league?leagueId=12345 — the number after leagueId= is your ID).

sport.title: Sport
sport.description: The fantasy sport for this league

league_id.title: League ID
league_id.description: Your ESPN Fantasy league ID (the number from the URL)

team_name.title: Display Name (Optional)
team_name.description: Custom name for the LED display. Leave blank to use your ESPN team name.

year.title: Season Year (Optional)
year.description: The season year. Leave blank for the current season.

display_modes.title: Step 3: Choose What to Display
display_modes.description: Select which views appear on your LED matrix

show_matchup.description: Matchup scoreboard — your team vs opponent with live scores

show_standings.description: League standings — scrolling ticker with team records

show_roster.description: Roster breakdown — player-by-player scores with projections

display_duration.description: Total display duration in seconds before moving to next plugin

matchup_hold.description: How many seconds to hold the matchup scoreboard before switching to the next view

update_interval.description: How often to refresh data from ESPN (seconds). Smart polling overrides this during live games.

smart_polling.title: Smart Polling
smart_polling.description: Automatically poll more frequently during active game windows and less often during idle times

enabled.description: Enable smart polling (recommended — saves API calls)

idle_interval.description: Polling interval outside of game windows (seconds)

layout.title: Layout Options
layout.description: Control what information appears on the display

show_projections.description: Show projected scores on the matchup and roster views

show_header.description: Show the week/period header on the matchup scoreboard

matchup_style.description: Matchup layout: 'split' shows each team on its own row, 'compact' shows a single-line score

scroll_speed.description: Scrolling speed in pixels per frame for standings and roster tickers

customization.title: Colors & Appearance
customization.description: Customize the colors used on the LED display (hex format, e.g. #FF0000 for red)

winning_color.title: Winning
winning_color.description: Color when your team is winning

losing_color.title: Losing
losing_color.description: Color when your team is losing

my_team_color.title: My Team Highlight
my_team_color.description: Highlight color for your team in standings

header_color.title: Header
header_color.description: Color for headers (week number, section labels)
